response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals and diverse technical experience, he fails to meet critical minimum qualifications for this role. Most significantly, he has only ~1 year of C++ programming experience against an 8-year requirement—a hard constraint for a cloud compute platform role. His background emphasizes breadth across full-stack, web, and embedded systems rather than specialized infrastructure and distributed systems depth. Additionally, there is no evidence of formal technical leadership mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers.
strengths: Proven technical leadership in senior/staff roles with demonstrated ability to establish engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, code standards)
Hands-on experience with distributed systems (Dunnhumby microservices at millions of requests/second) and infrastructure tooling (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
Strong teaching and mentorship track record (workshops, code dojos, multiple public talks on technical topics)
concerns: Critical gap: ~1 year of C++ experience vs. 8-year minimum requirement; career focus is multi-language full-stack rather than C++ infrastructure specialization
Limited evidence of formal cloud/DevOps technical leadership or mentoring; staff roles lack clear delegation to engineering teams in infrastructure domain
Career pattern shows breadth across mobile, web, desktop, and embedded systems rather than deep specialization in large-scale cloud infrastructure or compute platforms
